transcript: Speaker A: Don't skip the opportunity to study abroad! With the Duolingo English Test, we can make this process a lot less stressful for you and your wallet. Simply sign up on our website, complete your test in one hour, and in two days, you'll receive your results. All without having to leave your home! Sign up today and start practicing with our free tests!
on_screen_text: Don't skip the opportunity... to study abroad! With the Duolingo English Test, we can make this process a lot less stressful for you and your wallet. costs 1/3 of the other tests. sign up on our website. 1-hour test. results in 2 days. All without having to leave your home! sign up FREE. Start practicing with our free tests! duolingo english test
summary: The ad promotes the Duolingo English Test as an affordable, convenient option for studying abroad. It highlights key benefits like low cost, a 1-hour duration, and 2-day results from home. The CTA invites users to sign up for free practice tests.
